explanations.1: This tells Docker to use a specific syntax parser for understanding this Dockerfile, ensuring consistent behavior across different Docker versions.
explanations.5: This is a directive that tells hadolint (a Dockerfile linter) to skip a specific warning rule, in this case DL3008 which warns about pinning package versions for reproducibility.
explanations.6: This comment is reminding you that if you switch to a different base image like Ubuntu (which uses apt-get instead of apk), you'd need to adjust the package installation command accordingly.
explanations.9: Similar to line 5, this tells hadolint to ignore warning DL3002, which typically warns against running containers as the root user for security reasons.
